concepts.tagline: Fresh flavors bloom with every bite
concepts.creative_rationale: This concept captures the essence of renewal and fresh beginnings that spring brings, connecting the seasonal ingredients in our spring menu with the emotional warmth that Sweet Crumbs is known for.
concepts.visual_direction: Use bright, fresh colors with florals and green elements. Showcase seasonal ingredients like berries and herbs. Maintain the warm, artisanal aesthetic with natural lighting and handcrafted textures.

posts.post_text: 🌸 Spring has arrived at Sweet Crumbs! Our new seasonal menu celebrates the fresh flavors of the season with strawberry lavender scones, lemon herb focaccia, and our signature spring vegetable quiche. Each bite is handcrafted with love and the finest local ingredients. Come taste the season! ✨
posts.suggested_image_prompt: A rustic wooden table with an array of spring pastries: strawberry lavender scones with visible lavender buds, golden lemon herb focaccia with fresh herbs on top, and a slice of colorful spring vegetable quiche. Natural sunlight streaming through a window, with small spring flowers as decoration. Warm, inviting bakery atmosphere.

posts.post_text: At Sweet Crumbs Bakery, we believe the best ingredients tell a story. This spring, we're partnering with three local farms to bring you a seasonal menu rooted in community. From strawberry lavender scones to our herb-forward focaccia — every item on our spring menu has a farm, a farmer, and a story behind it. Supporting local never tasted so good.
posts.suggested_image_prompt: An elegant flat lay of spring baked goods on a marble surface: scones, focaccia, and a quiche slice arranged with fresh herbs and edible flowers. Clean, professional food photography style with soft natural light.

posts.post_text: Spring menu is HERE 🌸 Strawberry lavender scones. Lemon herb focaccia. Spring veggie quiche. All made fresh this morning. Stop by before they're gone 🙌
posts.suggested_image_prompt: Close-up shot of a golden strawberry lavender scone on a rustic wooden board, steam rising, surrounded by scattered lavender sprigs and fresh strawberries. Bright, warm morning light.

concepts.creative_rationale: Behind every loaf and pastry is a person who cares. This concept pulls back the curtain on the craft and the people behind it — building emotional connection and loyalty through authenticity.
concepts.visual_direction: Warm behind-the-scenes imagery: flour-dusted hands, the glow of the oven, bakers smiling. Focus on the human element. Golden tones, close-ups, candid moments.

posts.post_text: 4am. The ovens are on. The flour is flying. And we wouldn't have it any other way. 🧡 Every morning we show up for you — because there's nothing quite like a pastry that was made with real hands, real care, and a lot of love. This is why we bake. #BakedWithHeart
posts.suggested_image_prompt: A baker's flour-dusted hands shaping dough on a worn wooden counter in the early morning, warm oven light glowing softly in the background, golden hour atmosphere inside a cozy artisan bakery kitchen.

posts.post_text: We started Sweet Crumbs with one oven, one recipe, and one belief: that food made with care is food worth sharing. Six years later, we're still hand-rolling every croissant and sourcing every egg locally. Scale is tempting. But craft is our competitive advantage. What's yours?
posts.suggested_image_prompt: A warm and intimate bakery interior shot: shelves lined with fresh loaves of bread, a baker in the background tending to the oven, soft morning light through a window. Rustic, professional, inviting.

posts.post_text: We start baking at 4am so you get something fresh at 7am. No shortcuts. No frozen dough. Just real baking, every single morning. 🧡
posts.suggested_image_prompt: Dramatic close-up of a freshly baked golden croissant being pulled from the oven with tongs, flaky layers visible, steam rising, warm orange bakery light.

concepts.creative_rationale: Sweet Crumbs isn't just a bakery — it's a daily habit, a small joy that sets the tone for the day. This concept positions the brand as a meaningful part of customers' morning routines, driving frequency and loyalty.
concepts.visual_direction: Lifestyle imagery: coffee and pastry on a sunlit table, people enjoying their morning, cozy neighborhood vibes. Aspirational but achievable. Warm light, soft textures.

posts.post_text: Some mornings call for a really good pastry. ☕🥐 Your ritual starts here. Swing by Sweet Crumbs before 9 and grab the morning special — a fresh-baked croissant + coffee for just $6. Because you deserve a great start.
posts.suggested_image_prompt: A sunlit café table with a golden croissant on a white ceramic plate next to a latte with latte art, morning light streaming through a window with soft bokeh. Calm, aspirational morning atmosphere.

posts.post_text: The best meetings happen over great coffee and something fresh from the oven. Sweet Crumbs offers catering for your next team breakfast or client meeting — locally made, beautifully presented, and genuinely delicious. Drop us a message to plan yours.
posts.suggested_image_prompt: An elegant catering spread on a conference room table: assorted pastries, mini quiches, fruit, and coffee in branded carafes. Clean professional setting, natural light, upscale but approachable.

posts.post_text: Morning special until 9am: fresh croissant + coffee = $6. Come get it before we sell out (we always sell out) ☕🥐
posts.suggested_image_prompt: Top-down shot of a flaky croissant and a latte on a simple wooden table, minimal styling, bright morning light, clean and inviting.
